The '''Unity of Community''' was the urbanite government of [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] composed of a loose alliance of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[City/Legends|cities]] and towns. It was engaged in a protracted conflict with the [[Alwari]] tribal nomads dating back thousands of [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. A peace had been established around [[222 BBY/Legends|222 BBY]], but it was nearly torn apart by the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild's]] backing of the Unity during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] when it considered secession.

Ansion's [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Mousul]] was loyal to the Unity, which was led by the [[Unity Council]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] team representing both the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], to remedy the planet's generations-old border dispute, attempted to broker an equitable agreement between the urbanite Unity and the Alwari nomads of the Ansion plains. In this they were successful, which enabled the planet to stave off powerful Commerce Guild-led pressures for it to secede from the Republic. The Unity ultimately voted to reject secession.
